practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the sort-and-search clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for direct search, selection sort, and sorted merging.
hints: Linear search checks items one by one.
Selection sort finds the smallest remaining value.
Sorted merge compares the two current fronts.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main sort-and-search clues.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck direct search, selection sort, and sorted merging.

blanks.label: Main clue for merging sorted arrays
